files.patch:
@@ -32,0 +32,1 @@
+include ToolsJdk.gmk
@@ -80,1 +81,1 @@
-        -processor build.tools.valhalla.valuetypes.GenValueClasses
+        -processor $(VALUETYPE_GENSRC_PROCESSOR_NAME)
@@ -82,1 +83,2 @@
-    PROCESSOR_PATH += $(BUILDTOOLS_OUTPUTDIR)/jdk_tools_classes
+    PROCESSOR_PATH += $(VALUETYPE_GENSRC_PROCESSOR_PATH)
+    EXTRA_DEPS += $(VALUETYPE_GENSRC_PROCESSOR_DEP)
@@ -124,0 +126,1 @@
+    EXTRA_DEPS := $(EXTRA_DEPS), \
@@ -173,0 +176,1 @@
+        EXTRA_DEPS := $(VALUETYPE_GENSRC_PROCESSOR_DEP), \

@@ -48,1 +48,2 @@
-        build/tools/depend, \
+        build/tools/depend \
+        build/tools/valhalla, \
@@ -158,0 +159,10 @@
+$(eval $(call SetupJavaCompilation, COMPILE_VALUETYPE_GENSRC, \
+    TARGET_RELEASE := $(TARGET_RELEASE_BOOTJDK), \
+    SRC := $(TOPDIR)/make/jdk/src/classes/build/tools/valhalla/valuetypes/GenValueClasses.java, \
+    BIN := $(BUILDTOOLS_OUTPUTDIR)/valuetype_gensrc, \
+))
+
+TARGETS += $(COMPILE_VALUETYPE_GENSRC)
+
+################################################################################
+

@@ -145,0 +145,8 @@
+# Annotation processor for generating preview sources of annotated value classes.
+
+VALUETYPE_GENSRC_PROCESSOR_NAME := build.tools.valhalla.valuetypes.GenValueClasses
+VALUETYPE_GENSRC_PROCESSOR_PATH := $(BUILDTOOLS_OUTPUTDIR)/valuetype_gensrc
+VALUETYPE_GENSRC_PROCESSOR_DEP := $(VALUETYPE_GENSRC_PROCESSOR_PATH)/_the.COMPILE_VALUETYPE_GENSRC_batch
+
+################################################################################
+
